result.description:
We LOVE our members! On Sunday and Monday mornings members get exclusive access to the Museum for the first hour! 

All Children’s Museum members enjoy these benefits:  



Free admission during regular, open days

Exclusive entrance to the museum during our Sunday Member Mornings 

$2.00 discounts on each admission for up to six additional guests 

Discounted rates on Gift Corner purchases, Private Playdates, birthday parties, and admission to select events 

$1.00 discounts on each admission for up to four persons to the Schulz Museum and Snoopy’s Home Ice Arena 

Free coffee for Museum Members every second Sunday of the month during Sunday Member Mornings.



Interested in becoming a member? Check out our affordable Membership Levels here.

result.description: Taylor Trades is Sonoma County's premier Outdoor Market, held Sundays from 7AM – 2PM. Join us at the Santa Rosa Vets Building to shop a curated selection of antiques, vintage, vinyl, and collectibles. Enjoy local food options, coffee, and treats with FREE admission and FREE parking!

result.description:
We LOVE our members! On Sunday and Monday mornings members get exclusive access to the Museum for the first hour! 

All Children’s Museum members enjoy these benefits:  



Free admission during regular, open days

Exclusive entrance to the museum during our Sunday Member Mornings 

$2.00 discounts on each admission for up to six additional guests 

Discounted rates on Gift Corner purchases, Private Playdates, birthday parties, and admission to select events 

$1.00 discounts on each admission for up to four persons to the Schulz Museum and Snoopy’s Home Ice Arena 

Free coffee for Museum Members every second Sunday of the month during Sunday Member Mornings.



Interested in becoming a member? Check out our affordable Membership Levels here.
result.title: Member Mornings

events.description: Taylor Trades is Sonoma County's premier Outdoor Market, held Sundays from 7AM – 2PM. Join us at the Santa Rosa Vets Building to shop a curated selection of antiques, vintage, vinyl, and collectibles. Enjoy local food options, coffee, and treats with FREE admission and FREE parking!
